front:
SKILL 41 вҖ” MAKING AN OCCUPIED BED
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Clean linens, bath blanket, gloves, pillowcases
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Roll soiled sheet TOWARD resident's body (snug against back) вҖ” clean sheet behind it on your side
вӯҗ Resident rolls OVER the divide onto clean side вҖ” soiled sheets now on far side
вӯҗ NEVER shake soiled linen; NEVER put on floor or furniture
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy.
3. Stack clean linens on clean surface. Lock wheels. Raise side rails. Bed to working HEIGHT. Lower head FLAT. Gloves on.
4. Pull TOP SHEET loose at foot on your working side.
5. Open BATH BLANKET вҖ” DRAPE OVER resident (additional layer). Resident holds it. Reach under вҖ” pull TOP SHEET AND BLANKET together, pull OUT and DOWN to foot. Bath blanket = only covering.
6. Help resident ROLL toward RAISED FAR SIDE RAIL вҖ” back toward you, close to far edge.
7. On working side: loosen BOTTOM SHEET and bed protector from under mattress.
8. вӯҗ Roll soiled bottom sheet/protector TOWARD RESIDENT вҖ” push snug against back like a log against a wall.
9. Open CLEAN BOTTOM SHEET вҖ” fold-line along length. Tuck head end under mattress. Smooth toward resident. Roll excess and PUSH UNDER soiled linen вҖ” creating clean/soiled divide. Smooth flat on your side. Tuck foot end. Hospital corners. Draw sheet + bed protector same way.
10. вӯҗ Raise your NEAR SIDE RAIL. Walk to OTHER SIDE. Lower far side rail. Help resident ROLL BACK over the divide toward you вҖ” they're now on the clean half. Soiled linen bundle is on far half.
11. вӯҗ Grab soiled bundle вҖ” UNROLL it, SOILED SIDE INWARD throughout. Check for belongings. HAMPER вҖ” no shaking, no floor, no furniture.
12. Change gloves + wash hands.
13. вӯҗ Pull clean sheet through вҖ” straight and tight. Tuck head end. Smooth flat, no wrinkles. Tuck foot end. Hospital corners. Pull draw sheet and protector through, smooth, tuck.
14. Help resident roll to CENTER of bed. Pillow under head. Raise NEAR SIDE RAIL.
15. Open TOP SHEET over resident. Resident holds it. Reach under, slide BATH BLANKET out toward foot вҖ” HAMPER.
16. BLANKET over top sheet. Tuck both at foot. Hospital corners. LOOSEN over feet. Fold top sheet OVER blanket 6 inches at top.
17. Remove PILLOWS. Peel pillowcases inside-out. Hamper.
18. вӯҗ Remove gloves. WASH HANDS. Fresh pillowcase per instructions (inside-out over arm, grab narrow pillow end, pull over). Open end AWAY FROM DOOR.
19. Check comfort. Adjust position if needed.
20. Bed to LOWEST. Side rails per order. Remove privacy.
21. Call light. Carry hamper. Wash hands. Report. Document.

front:
SKILL 42 вҖ” MEASURING & RECORDING ORAL TEMPERATURE (DIGITAL)
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Digital thermometer, disposable probe sheath, gloves
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Seat sheath on probe until it clicks; press power вҖ” wait for READY signal
вӯҗ Place probe in SUBLINGUAL POCKET (under tongue, one side of frenulum) вҖ” lips closed, NOT teeth
вӯҗ Read display IMMEDIATELY when it beeps; document method as "Oral" or "O"
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy. Gloves on.
3. вӯҗ Pull out DISPOSABLE SHEATH. Slide PROBE END into sheath вҖ” feel/hear click as it seats. Press POWER BUTTON. Wait for READY signal (beep + symbol on display).
4. Ask resident to OPEN MOUTH. Locate SUBLINGUAL POCKET (under tongue, one side of frenulum вҖ” the cord under tongue).
5. вӯҗ Insert probe gently into sublingual pocket. Ask resident to CLOSE LIPS around it (NOT teeth).
6. Hold still. Watch screen. Listen for BEEP or watch for light blink вҖ” reading done.
7. вӯҗ Slide thermometer OUT. READ DISPLAY IMMEDIATELY вҖ” memorize temperature before anything else.
8. Use TISSUE to grasp sheath вҖ” peel OFF and WRAP in tissue. Drop in trash. Return thermometer to protective case.
9. Remove gloves. Wash hands.
10. Write TEMPERATURE, DATE, TIME, METHOD вҖ” write "Oral" or "O." on documentation form.
11. Call light. Report changes.

front:
SKILL 43 вҖ” COUNTING AND RECORDING RADIAL PULSE
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Watch with second hand
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Use INDEX + MIDDLE fingers on THUMB SIDE of inner wrist вҖ” NEVER use your thumb
вӯҗ Count for ONE FULL MINUTE вҖ” must be accurate within 4 BPM
вӯҗ REPORT IMMEDIATELY if pulse is BELOW 60 or ABOVE 100 BPM
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy.
3. вӯҗ Resident's arm resting at side or across lap вҖ” PALM FACING UP.
4. вӯҗ Place INDEX FINGER + MIDDLE FINGER together on THUMB SIDE of inner wrist (just below base of thumb). Press gently вҖ” feel rhythmic tapping = radial artery. DO NOT use THUMB (it has its own pulse).
5. вӯҗ Glance at watch вҖ” note second hand. Count each beat for ONE FULL MINUTE without stopping. Note final count. Must be within 4 BPM.
6. Also note: RHYTHM (regular or skips?) and STRENGTH (strong/full or weak/thready?).
7. Call light. Wash hands.
8. Write PULSE RATE, DATE, TIME, METHOD вҖ” write "Radial" or "R."
9. вӯҗ REPORT IMMEDIATELY if pulse is BELOW 60 or ABOVE 100 BPM.

front:
SKILL 44 вҖ” COUNTING AND RECORDING RESPIRATIONS
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Watch with second hand
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ DO NOT TELL resident you're counting breathing вҖ” they'll change their rate
вӯҗ After pulse count, keep fingers on wrist but watch chest rise/fall вҖ” each rise+fall = 1 breath
вӯҗ Must be accurate within 2 breaths; REPORT IMMEDIATELY if irregular
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy.
3. Comfortable position for resident.
4. вӯҗ DO NOT tell resident you're counting breathing вҖ” people immediately change their rate when aware.
5. вӯҗ After finishing RADIAL PULSE COUNT вҖ” KEEP FINGERS ON WRIST (looks like still counting pulse). Actually now watching CHEST AND ABDOMEN. Each RISE + FALL = ONE BREATH.
6. вӯҗ Glance at watch. Count every rise-and-fall for ONE FULL MINUTE. Must be within 2 breaths.
7. Also note: REGULAR or IRREGULAR? SHALLOW or DEEP? Any NOISE (wheezing, gurgling, rattling)? LABORED?
8. вӯҗ Call light. Wash hands.
9. Write RESPIRATORY RATE. Also note pattern and character (regular, shallow, wheezing, etc.).
10. вӯҗ REPORT IMMEDIATELY if breathing is IRREGULAR or if you hear wheezing.

front:
SKILL 45 вҖ” GIVING A BACKRUB
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Lotion, basin of warm water, towels, bath blanket
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Warm lotion BOTTLE in basin of warm water for 5 minutes before starting
вӯҗ Continuous OVAL/FIGURE-8 strokes from BUTTOCKS up SPINE sides to SHOULDERS and back вҖ” hands never leave skin вҖ” 3-5 minutes
вӯҗ Circular fingertip pressure over bony prominences; if skin is WHITE, RED, or PURPLE вҖ” do NOT massage, notify nurse
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy.
3. вӯҗ LOTION BOTTLE in BASIN OF WARM WATER вҖ” soak 5 MINUTES. Cold lotion causes muscle tension.
4. Lock wheels. Raise side rails. Bed to working HEIGHT. Lower head FLAT.
5. Help resident onto SIDE or STOMACH. Bath blanket/towel over them. Fold linens DOWN to TOP OF BUTTOCKS вҖ” entire back exposed neck to tailbone.
6. вӯҗ Pour lotion into YOUR PALMS (silver-dollar sized). Rub palms together until warm.
7. вӯҗ LONG STROKES: both palms flat, one each side of UPPER BUTTOCKS. Fingers toward head. Push UPWARD вҖ” simultaneously up EACH SIDE OF SPINE to SHOULDERS. At shoulders: CIRCLE OUTWARD. Move DOWN outer edges/flanks. At BUTTOCKS: CIRCLE. Move back UP. CONTINUOUS вҖ” hands never leave skin. Repeat 3-5 MINUTES (oval/racetrack pattern).
8. вӯҗ KNEADING: loose claw (first 2 fingers + thumb). Walk up each side of spine from tailbone to shoulders вҖ” gentle downward pressure. Circle at shoulders and buttocks.
9. вӯҗ BONY AREAS (spine, shoulder blades, hip bones): fingertips, small CIRCULAR MOTIONS with light pressure. LOOK at each area вҖ” WHITE, RED, or PURPLE skin = DO NOT MASSAGE вҖ” notify nurse after.
10. "Almost done" вҖ” several more long smooth upward strokes to conclude.
11. Blot extra lotion dry with towel (pat, don't rub).
12. Remove blanket/towel. Help dress. Comfortable position.
13. Bed to LOWEST. Side rails per order. Remove privacy. Call light.
14. Return lotion to storage. Wash hands. Report skin findings. Document.

front:
SKILL 46 вҖ” PROVIDING ORAL CARE
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Gloves, toothbrush, toothpaste, water cup, emesis basin, clothing protector, lip moisturizer
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Head of bed fully UPRIGHT вҖ” 90 degrees (full sitting position) before starting
вӯҗ Brush order: inner uppers вҶ’ outer uppers вҶ’ chewing uppers вҶ’ inner lowers вҶ’ outer lowers вҶ’ chewing lowers вҶ’ TONGUE (back to tip)
вӯҗ Report: abnormal odor, lip cracking, sores, bleeding gums, tongue/mouth discoloration
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy.
3. вӯҗ Lock wheels. Raise side rails. Adjust bed. Raise HEAD COMPLETELY вҖ” resident at FULL UPRIGHT 90-DEGREE SITTING POSITION (spine vertical). Gloves on.
4. Drape CLOTHING PROTECTOR/TOWEL across chest вҖ” like a bib, tuck into collar.
5. WET toothbrush bristles under running water. Shake off excess. PEA-SIZED toothpaste.
6. вӯҗ Tell resident to OPEN MOUTH. Brush in order:
   вҖў INNER UPPER (tongue-side of upper teeth, along gumline вҖ” short back-and-forth)
   вҖў OUTER UPPER (lip-side, along gumline)
   вҖў CHEWING UPPER (flat tops, back-and-forth)
   вҖў INNER LOWER
   вҖў OUTER LOWER
   вҖў CHEWING LOWER
   вҖў TONGUE: toothbrush flat, BACK OF TONGUE to TIP вҖ” 2-3 strokes
7. Pour water into cup. Hold to lips: "Take a sip and rinse." Hold EMESIS BASIN curved side under chin. Spit. WIPE mouth with washcloth. Remove clothing protector.
8. Lip MOISTURIZER on gloved fingertip вҖ” sweep across upper then lower lip.
9. Soiled items in proper containers. Bed to LOWEST. Side rails per order. Remove privacy.
10. Call light. Rinse toothbrush (bristles on gloved palm under water). Stand in holder BRISTLES UP. Empty/rinse/dry emesis basin. Return supplies.
11. Remove gloves. Wash hands.
12. вӯҗ Report to nurse: mouth ODOR, lip CRACKING at corners, SORES in mouth, BLEEDING gums, DISCOLORATION.
13. Document.

front:
SKILL 47 вҖ” PROVIDING ORAL CARE (UNRESPONSIVE RESIDENT)
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Gloves, sponge swabs, cleaning solution, water, towel, emesis basin, lip moisturizer, tongue depressor
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Turn HEAD TOWARD YOU вҖ” gravity prevents fluid pooling in throat; EMESIS BASIN at cheek
вӯҗ Sponge swab must be SQUEEZED NEARLY DRY before use вҖ” DAMP not wet (prevents aspiration)
вӯҗ SPEAK TO RESIDENT throughout вҖ” hearing may still be functioning
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter.
2. вӯҗ Identify yourself and resident BY NAME вҖ” then SAY IT OUT LOUD to them. "Hi [name], I'm [your name]. I'm going to clean your mouth now." SPEAK throughout the entire procedure (hearing may still function).
3. Wash hands. Explain procedure out loud. Privacy.
4. Lock wheels. Raise side rails. Adjust bed. Gloves on.
5. вӯҗ TURN RESIDENT'S HEAD TOWARD YOU (rotate on pillow, facing your direction). Gravity keeps fluids from pooling in throat. Place FOLDED TOWEL under CHEEK AND CHIN. Place EMESIS BASIN on towel next to cheek вҖ” catchment for drainage.
6. TONGUE DEPRESSOR: gently insert flat end between upper and lower teeth on one side. Use to hold mouth open throughout.
7. вӯҗ SPONGE SWAB: dip in CLEANING SOLUTION. SQUEEZE FIRMLY between fingers over container вҖ” remove as much excess as possible. Swab must be DAMP, NOT WET. Too much liquid = aspiration risk.
8. вӯҗ With squeezed damp swab: WIPE TEETH вҶ’ GUMS вҶ’ TONGUE вҶ’ INNER CHEEKS. Change swab FREQUENTLY (every 1-2 surfaces). Continue until all areas visibly clean.
9. вӯҗ FRESH CLEAN SWAB: dip in PLAIN WATER. SQUEEZE FIRMLY again. Rinse same areas вҖ” TEETH вҶ’ GUMS вҶ’ TONGUE вҶ’ INNER CHEEKS.
10. Remove towel from cheek. Remove basin. Pat lips/face DRY if wet.
11. LIP MOISTURIZER on gloved fingertip вҖ” sweep upper then lower lip.
12. Soiled items in proper containers. Bed to LOWEST. Side rails per order. Remove privacy. Call light.
13. Empty/rinse/dry emesis basin. Return to storage. Remove gloves. Wash hands.
14. вӯҗ Report: ODOR, CRACKING, SORES, BLEEDING, DISCOLORATION. Document.

front:
SKILL 48 вҖ” CLEANING AND STORING DENTURES
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Gloves, denture brush, denture cleanser or toothpaste, denture cup with lid, labeled storage, towel
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ TOWEL in bottom of SINK + partially fill with water вҖ” cushions dentures if dropped
вӯҗ COOL/MODERATE water only вҖ” hot water WARPS and DISTORTS the plastic
вӯҗ Clean THE GROOVE (curved trough touching gum) вҖ” must be thoroughly scrubbed
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Wash hands. Gloves on.
2. вӯҗ Go to sink. Lay FOLDED TOWEL flat in BOTTOM OF SINK. PARTIALLY FILL sink with a few inches of water. Towel + water = cushion if dentures drop.
3. вӯҗ Ask resident for dentures (or remove if unable). Hold over water-filled sink. Run MODERATE/COOL water вҖ” NOT hot. RINSE all surfaces before cleaning.
4. Apply DENTURE CLEANSER or toothpaste to DENTURE BRUSH (softer than regular).
5. вӯҗ Hold denture in one hand over sink. Brush all surfaces:
   вҖў OUTER SURFACES (toward cheeks/lips) вҖ” short circular strokes
   вҖў INNER SURFACES (toward tongue)
   вҖў CHEWING SURFACES (flat biting tops)
   вҖў THE GROOVE (curved trough on UNDERSIDE that contacts GUM) вҖ” must be thoroughly cleaned
6. RINSE entire denture under MODERATE/COOL running water вҖ” rotate under stream, all surfaces. No hot water.
7. RINSE inside of DENTURE CUP AND LID under clean water. Dry with paper towel.
8. вӯҗ Fill denture cup with cleaning SOLUTION or MODERATE/COOL WATER вҖ” enough to COMPLETELY SUBMERGE both pieces. Place upper + lower dentures FULLY COVERED. LID on and pressed closed. Confirm label = RESIDENT'S NAME. Return to correct storage location.
   If resident wants to WEAR dentures вҖ” rinse and hand back. Do not store.
9. Rinse denture brush. Dry. Return equipment. DRAIN sink. TOWEL to laundry hamper.
10. Remove gloves. Wash hands.
11. Document. вӯҗ Report CHIPS, CRACKS, DISCOLORATION, or changes in denture appearance to nurse.

front:
SKILL 49 вҖ” SHAVING A RESIDENT (ELECTRIC RAZOR)
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Electric razor, shaving brush, towel, aftershave (if desired), gloves, mirror
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ CHECK before starting: water nearby? Oxygen in use? Pacemaker? If ANY YES вҖ” do NOT use electric razor
вӯҗ Pull skin TAUT with non-dominant hand before each stroke
вӯҗ Clean razor head after: open/remove head, brush out whiskers, RECAP until clicks
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy.
3. Lock wheels. Raise side rails. Adjust bed. Raise head вҖ” resident sitting upright.
4. Drape TOWEL across chest horizontally вҖ” catches whiskers and debris.
5. Gloves on.
6. Use small brush to SWEEP whiskers from razor head. Tap head on gloved palm.
7. вӯҗ BEFORE turning on: CHECK вҖ” water nearby? OXYGEN (mask or cannula)? PACEMAKER in care plan? If ANY YES вҖ” do NOT use electric razor (spark/shock risk). Use alternative method.
8. вӯҗ Press POWER BUTTON вҖ” razor hums. Pull skin TAUT with NON-DOMINANT HAND вҖ” stretch flat where about to shave.
9. вӯҗ FOIL SHAVER: BACK-AND-FORTH strokes in DIRECTION of beard growth.
   THREE-HEAD SHAVER: SLOW, WIDE CIRCULAR MOTIONS.
   For both: CHIN (flat against), UNDERSIDE OF CHIN (tip razor slightly, ear to ear), cheeks вҶ’ jawline вҶ’ upper lip вҶ’ chin вҶ’ neck.
10. Hold MIRROR so resident can see reflection. Check for missed spots.
11. If desired: pour AFTERSHAVE into cupped palm. Rub palms together. Pat gently onto freshly shaved areas.
12. Remove towel вҖ” shake INTO TRASH (not into room air). Towel to proper container.
13. Run hand over face/neck and bed surface вҖ” remove any loose hairs.
14. Bed to LOWEST. Side rails per order. Remove privacy. Call light.
15. вӯҗ Clean razor: open/remove SHAVING HEAD. Shake out debris into trash. Brush inside completely clean. REPLACE/RECAP head (click closed). Return to case.
16. Remove gloves. Wash hands. Report skin nicks, irritation, rashes. Document.
